ha663592agacb4g4053g9a06g15ddc044f354: Do you think your kin search for you, Lae'zel?
h9a365d09ge3e8g41f2gbb58g1e184fe5c193: I know they do not. It is my responsibility to cleanse myself.
h948718c9g9bbdg4a9agadd4g360ec21f452a: They pursued the nautiloid. Perhaps they were trying to free you.
hba4a5791g2cbbg41cdg8ae5g63916efa9609: A vain notion. I am one of many and will not be a burden to my Queen.
